item.title: Return of the Meme: 1379 (toting swords)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Sometimes, the dragon BECOMES your wife!
Ouzels, also known as Dippers, are the world's only aquatic songbirds.
Look. Here's my unpopular opinion. Put whatever the fuck you want on your pizza. It's your pizza. Not mine.
These are all a mood.
A very pertinent lesson to keep in mind right now.
If you've ever wondered why I post so many memes about Buddhism, it's the fact that it was the major focus in my undergraduate minor in Religious Studies, so I get a lot more of the jokes. (I also dabbled heavily in Zen Buddhism for two years of that time, so there's that, too.)
Among other things, yeah.
I think I have the only parrot in the world who hates millet.
The wonders of Avian navigation never cease to amaze me.
Ah crap, should have saved this for the opening of a future meme post.
One person researching and developing this mod became Mormon. Another realized they were Trans. Someone joked about using this meme to describe it. And so it was made.
Horned lizards are my absolute favorite living pancakes.
I have at least two swords in my car currently. Need to clean out my car before the Phoenix jaunt.
I mean, he wasn't that much more horrible than your standard Roman governor of a foreign province, but then, they pretty much all were horrible people.
There is never a bad time for Dungeonsynth. Except maybe during sex. I wouldn't know.
Such a bizzare critter.
This might be enough garlic for me.
Permian creatures with sails.
I mean, I'd take that as a way to go, sounds quicker than how late-stage capitalism is slowly killing me.
Or by giving them memes.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: [absolute silence] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: How Dare They Speak Spanish in California?

item.title: My heart!! I was not expecting these feels today, but fuck this is amazing!

item.title: Images of Note: NO SALT IT DANGER!!11!
item.description:
?
Meanwhile here in Scotland, even our castles have wheelchair ramps.
https://theanarchistlibrary.org/library/petr-kropotkin-the-conquest-of-bread
D:
https://youtu.be/GLUvFe-Y-zw?t=8
That is the first pig!
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
rawr. game i cannot wait for is coming out in 20 hours and am like. want rn. havnt felt like playing anything or being social since last friday so hopefully this friday and saturday will help pull me out of my little self isolating. anyway memes. enjoy! edit: game is dis: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1601570/The_Alters/
was very evil in my discord last night. in the fun interacting way.
mhmm...
sometimes you just gotta let it happen and get it out that way. feel like thats all I have been doing with what little emotions I have left.
...could be to do with all the trauma and horrible people I have had in my life previously. feel like I am getting better at filtering out people and also now just am like. I dont want anymore. am happy with the few I have in my life rn. well okay maybe a couple more. idk.
...
but its pretty. and not ai cause I just checked.
...
...
I dont know if my broken mind will ever believe this. think those neural pathways are pretty locked in and corrective thinking doesnt seem to change them much.
sometimes I am still like. oh. I have followers. I have people that like my memes and enjoy them. hm.
mhmm.
oh boy.
really trying to have discipline with myself and moving forward and also struggling with it so much.
yup.
oh yea. spread it.
...
o.
...
...
...
i dunno about that. kinda sick of these feelings things.
mhmm.
oh is this the other part to the one I posted the other day?
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We will be doing DnD things in the future here shortly. Will be interesting. So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "I stand before you as a tower of strength, the weight of the world on my shoulders. As you pass through my life, look, but not too close, for I fear I will expose the vulnerable me." -Deidra Sarault "We tend to think of the rational as a higher order, but it is the emotional that marks our lives. One often learns more from ten days of agony than from ten years of contentment." -Merle Shain "My lifetime listens to yours." -Muriel Rukeyser "What people really need is a good listening to." Mary Lou Casey I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #deliciousness #potato #memes #dailydirties
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #126
item.description:
I don’t know why this is so compressed or why racists is censored this is how I found it
Don’t think that’s how it works but if it was he should’ve given it to Momo for five minutes before realising it’s the biggest mistake ever
Looks cooler than if it was correct imo. Spines go hard

item.title: Tiny Octopus' latest "how to"
item.description: Seriously. As a developer, shitty source control is tiny octopus' number one pet peeve. How can you reliably build ANYTHING if you don't know what the environment is? And then try to blame him when he doesn't even handle migrations? Ugh.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus
